input.command:
NS="karma-rabbitmq-day2-ops-lifecycle-adv-21e621f7-cluster-a"
kubectl -n $NS get pods -o wide
echo "---"
kubectl -n $NS get svc
echo "---"
kubectl -n $NS get configmap
input.description: List pods, services, and configmaps in the namespace

apiVersion: v1
data:
  prometheus.yml: |
    global:
      scrape_interval: 15s
    scrape_configs:
      - job_name: "prometheus"
        static_configs:
          - targets: ["localhost:9090"]
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
